name: Rhode Island CRLB Registrant and Licensee Search

agency.name: Rhode Island Contractors' Registration and Licensing Board

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the CRLB search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: contractor registrations and related CRLB license categories exposed by the public search
knownExclusions: CRLB covers contractor registration and several state building office license categories; this source entry does not represent every Rhode Island trade, permit, or business authorization.
Lookup, roster generation, and enforcement-action paths may have different coverage and terms that require separate review.
Complaint and enforcement history is not normalized by this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Prefer official roster/export mechanisms if confirmed before lookup automation.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a registration, license, or authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: The Rhode Island lookup documentation references lookup paths and some roster generation elsewhere, but no CRLB redistribution-safe bulk path is confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Rhode Island contractor registration and related CRLB license lookup.
maintainerNotes: Keep CRLB registration, licensing, and enforcement-action boundaries explicit in future adapter work.

researchEvidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.

blocker.summary: No stable, documented machine-readable official interface is currently suitable for an offline-tested adapter.
